posts.text:
Ships are passing through normally to Iranian ports and operations at the ports are carried out continuously: Mehr

Translation: tankers filled with Chinese oil can go through
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text:
Though some Africans caught up in the war have military experience and may have gone to fight voluntarily, many say they were forcibly recruited under false pretences  http://econ.st/4s01YRR

posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran announces that facilities associated with major US technology companies could become targets next.

They specifically note that Amazon, Microsoft, Nvidia, IBM, Oracle, and Palantir are all potential targets across Israel, Dubai, and Abu Dhabi.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Don’t get stuck looking in the rear view mirror, eyes on the road ahead.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
